title: Email
summary: Drafts email replies and new messages grounded in the user's second-brain (project context, prior decisions) and keeps multi-message threads coherent over a long back-and-forth. Grounds facts in the brain — asks instead of inventing — and never sends without explicit approval.
problem: Email replies lose context across a long thread and risk stating things that aren't true. This grounds every draft in real project knowledge and tracks the chain so nothing gets contradicted or forgotten.

skills.name: email-assistant
skills.purpose: Draft replies/new messages grounded in the second-brain and track multi-message threads so a long exchange stays coherent. Drafts only — never sends unapproved.
